title: ericameria humilis
intro: Ericameria humilis, also known as the Gray Rabbitbrush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The Gray Rabbitbrush has been used to treat various health issues, such as colds, flu, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
